contentList:
Gold Wyrmling Sword The fire engulfing this weapon seems to feed off thin air, never once burning the dark handle.
Silver Wyrmling Staff Silver Wyrmling Sword The cold emanating from this weapon seems to suck all heat from the air, never once chilling the dark handle.
Ruby Wyrmling Staff Ruby Wyrmling Sword The force resonating through this weapon seems to vibrate the air, never once breaking the dark handle.
Bronze Wyrmling Staff Bronze Wyrmling Sword The lightning charging this weapon seems to electrify the air, never once shocking the dark handle.
Diamond Wyrmling Staff Diamond Wyrmling Sword The radiance emitting from this weapon seems to light up the air, never once brightening the dark handle.
Emerald Wyrmling Staff Emerald Wyrmling Sword The necrosis spreading through this weapon seems to descrate the air, never once rotting the dark handle.
Amethyst Wyrmling Staff Amethyst Wyrmling Sword The psychosis permeating this weapon seems to travel through thin air, never once weakening the dark handle.
Copper Wyrmling Staff Copper Wyrmling Sword The acid coating this weapon seems to make the air around it acrid, never once eroding the dark handle.
Green Wyrmling Staff Green Wyrmling Sword The poison dripping from this weapon seems to suffuse the air, never once enfusing the dark handle.
Red Wyrmling Staff Red Wyrmling Sword The flame enveloping this weapon seems to feed off thin air, never once singeing the dark handle.
Sapphire Wyrmling Staff Sapphire Wyrmling Sword The thunder contained within this weapon seems to shake the air, never once affecting the dark handle.
Gold Great Wyrm Sword Gold Great Wyrm Staff The combined power of Ansur, Heart of the Gate, and Kereska, draconic goddess of arcane knowledge, imbues this weapon with elemental energy. As a great man once said: "Fire".
Silver Great Wyrm Sword Silver Great Wyrm Staff The combined power of Ansur, Heart of the Gate, and Kereska, draconic goddess of arcane knowledge, imbues this weapon with elemental energy. The cold never bothered you anyway.
Ruby Great Wyrm Sword Ruby Great Wyrm Staff The combined power of Ansur, Heart of the Gate, and Kereska, draconic goddess of arcane knowledge, imbues this weapon with elemental energy. The force will surround you, penetrate you, and bind Faerun together.
Bronze Great Wyrm Sword Bronze Great Wyrm Staff The combined power of Ansur, Heart of the Gate, and Kereska, draconic goddess of arcane knowledge, imbues this weapon with elemental energy. Lightning Bolts will shoot from your finger tips.
Diamond Great Wyrm Sword Diamond Great Wyrm Staff The combined power of Ansur, Heart of the Gate, and Kereska, draconic goddess of arcane knowledge, imbues this weapon with elemental energy. Soon, there will be far more than four lights.
Emerald Great Wyrm Sword Emerald Great Wyrm Staff The combined power of Ansur, Heart of the Gate, and Kereska, draconic goddess of arcane knowledge, imbues this weapon with elemental energy. {{- /* TODO */ -}}
Amethyst Great Wyrm Sword Amethyst Great Wyrm Staff The combined power of Ansur, Heart of the Gate, and Kereska, draconic goddess of arcane knowledge, imbues this weapon with elemental energy. {{- /* TODO */ -}}
Copper Great Wyrm Sword Copper Great Wyrm Staff The combined power of Ansur, Heart of the Gate, and Kereska, draconic goddess of arcane knowledge, imbues this weapon with elemental energy. You'll be able to channel levels of toxicity unheard of in this genre.
Green Great Wyrm Sword Green Great Wyrm Staff The combined power of Ansur, Heart of the Gate, and Kereska, draconic goddess of arcane knowledge, imbues this weapon with elemental energy. Your opponents will fall victim to one of the classic blunders: not developing an immunity to poison.
Sapphire Great Wyrm Sword Sapphire Great Wyrm Staff The combined power of Ansur, Heart of the Gate, and Kereska, draconic goddess of arcane knowledge, imbues this weapon with elemental energy. You will become a seductive lord of thunder.
Once per combat, your staff will allow you to cast this using a bonus action instead of an action. Once per short rest, your staff will allow you to cast this using a bonus action instead of an action.
{{ range $cantrip, $values := $.QuickenedCantrips }} Quickened {{.Title}} You can use your staff to cast <LSTag Type="Spell" Tooltip="{{.SpellType}}_MAG_{{$cantrip}}_Staff">{{.Title}}</LSTag> using a bonus action instead of an action. Usable once per {{ if $.Values.QuickenedCantripsPerCombat }}combat{{else}}short rest{{end}}. {{ end }}
